originalTitle: Mali junta leader names himself defence minister after predecessor killed
title: Mali junta leader names himself defence minister after predecessor killed
content: Former Defence Minister Sadio Camara was killed in a massive offensive by combined jihadist and separatist forces.

originalTitle: New alliance shakes up Nigerian political landscape
title: New alliance shakes up Nigerian political landscape
content: Peter Obi and Rabiu Kwankwaso, who came third and fourth respectively in the last elections, switch parties.

originalTitle: BBC uncovers the Ugandan scammers abusing dogs to elicit donations from animal lovers
title: BBC uncovers the Ugandan scammers abusing dogs to elicit donations from animal lovers
content: Unwitting donors hand over money to save suffering animals but Ugandan con artists pocket the cash.

originalTitle: US Secret Service shoots gunman near White House
title: US Secret Service shoots gunman near White House
content: The suspect has been taken to hospital following the shooting in Washington.

originalTitle: Macron sings as Armenia’s leader drums in unusual moment at state dinner
title: Macron sings as Armenia’s leader drums in unusual moment at state dinner
content: French President Emmanuel Macron sang ‘La Boheme’ accompanied by Armenian Prime Minister Nikol Pashinyan on the drums.

originalTitle: Russian air attacks kill five at Ukraine’s Naftogaz gas facilities
title: Russian air attacks kill five at Ukraine’s Naftogaz gas facilities
content: Three workers and two emergency service rescuers ​killed and 37 others wounded, Naftogaz CEO Serhiy ​Koretskyi says.

originalTitle: Explosion at China fireworks factory kills 26 people
title: Explosion at China fireworks factory kills 26 people
content: A blast at a fireworks factory in Hunan province has killed 26 people and injured 61, state media report.

originalTitle: Two killed and many injured after car driven into crowd in German city of Leipzig
title: Two killed and many injured after car driven into crowd in German city of Leipzig
content: A 33-year-old German citizen was detained following the incident, the authorities say.

originalTitle: Second hantavirus case confirmed after deaths on cruise ship
title: Second hantavirus case confirmed after deaths on cruise ship
content: The operator of the MV Hondius ship says a Dutch couple and a German national have died.

originalTitle: Foden reaches agreement over new Man City deal
title: Foden reaches agreement over new Man City deal
content: England midfielder Phil Foden reaches an agreement in principle over a new four-year deal at Manchester City.

originalTitle: What now for Rohl's Rangers as title hopes fade?
title: What now for Rohl's Rangers as title hopes fade?
content: Rangers' Scottish Premiership title challenge has been undone by two damaging defeats by Motherwell and Hearts. What now for Danny Rohl and his players?

originalTitle: Who has made Troy's Premier League team of the week?
title: Who has made Troy's Premier League team of the week?
content: After every round of Premier League matches this season, Troy Deeney gives us his team of the week. Do you agree with his choices?
